More details here.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":116,"length":4}],"data":[]},{"key":"4scp9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7hs69","text":"If you know creative/unusual protocols like these, please tweet them to #ExoticMethods, e-mail to \"info@protocols.io\", or share directly as a protocol here, tagging with \"ExoticMethods\".","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":99,"length":17}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"25416CA30F16484A8BE49049FF23C0E7","url":"https://www.protocols.io/g/verve-net/news/call-for-recipes"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9CA2CF1C499841A3A73CAF5A005B178C","url":"mailto:info@protocols.io"}}}}
